streams.name: BLOODBANK_V3_EVENTS

notes: Immutable CloudEvents traffic belongs in this stream.
Operators can replay this stream when rebuilding projections or recovering a consumer.
This stream is the durable home for v3 event traffic.
Keep business facts in this stream and do not treat commands as replay input.

streams.name: BLOODBANK_V3_COMMANDS

notes: Commands are mutable requests and should be handled once, not replayed as source-of-truth history.
Replies use reply.> subjects and are not part of the durable command stream.
Command traffic is operational, not archival.
Use a separate dead-letter policy in later operational tickets rather than coupling this scaffold to RabbitMQ patterns.
Dead-letter handling should be introduced explicitly for each consumer group when the runtime services are added.
This scaffold does not couple NATS to the legacy RabbitMQ dead-letter model.
